name: kw-package/faq-accordion
title: FAQ Accordion
description: Expandable FAQ accordion with multiple style variants, layout options, optional category tabs, and smooth collapse/expand transitions.

description.default: Everything you need to know about our platform. Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out to our support team.

default.question: What is included in the free trial?
default.answer: Our free trial gives you full access to all features for 14 days — no credit card required. You'll be able to create unlimited projects, invite up to 10 team members, and explore every integration we offer.

default.question: How does billing work after the trial?
default.answer: After your trial ends, you'll be prompted to choose a plan. We offer monthly and annual billing. You'll only be charged after you actively select a plan — no surprise charges.

default.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
default.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. Your access continues until the end of your current billing period.

default.question: Do you offer a discount for annual plans?
default.answer: Yes! Annual plans save you 20% compared to monthly billing. The discount is applied automatically when you select annual billing at checkout.

default.question: What integrations do you support?
default.answer: We support 50+ integrations including Slack, GitHub, Jira, Figma, Notion, and more. Our REST API also lets you build custom integrations.
